description: Navigation smoke test (ported to testCases schema, Sprint 40 F79 follow-up 2026-06-05). Action-only: each click's selector resolution within stepTimeoutMs IS the assertion that the prior navigation succeeded. Flow: home -> account-scoped Settings dialog -> Settings General -> Manage Rules (verifies Add-block-rule FAB by clicking it open and cancelling) -> back to home. Verified against live UI 2026-06-05. Read-only: no DB writes (cancels out of the create screen).
